title: Automating BOS and ChoCH Detection in MQL5
subtitle: Fractal-Based BOS/ChoCH with CrossedOver/CrossedUnder Closed-Bar Logic, os_state Machine
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: HIGH EXTRACT — exact BOS/ChoCH classification algorithm. CrossedOver/CrossedUnder closed-bar pattern is exactly what our StructureEngine detects. os_state machine for alternating BOS/ChoCH is the cleaner implementation vs our current detect_structure_break().

definitions.BOS: Break of Structure — price closes beyond a prior fractal extreme in the SAME direction as the prevailing trend. Confirms trend continuation.
definitions.ChoCH: Change of Character — price closes beyond a prior fractal extreme in the OPPOSITE direction to the prevailing trend. First warning of reversal.
definitions.distinction: Same direction as trend = BOS. Opposite = ChoCH. The os_state variable tracks which was the most recent break.

step_1_fractal_detection.window: g_length = 2 * LengthInput + 1 (center bar surrounded by LengthInput bars on each side)

step_3_classification.ChoCH_rule: Cross in direction OPPOSITE to os_state → ChoCH (first sign of reversal)
step_3_classification.BOS_rule: Cross in direction SAME as os_state → BOS (trend confirmation)
step_3_classification.state_update: After each cross, flip os_state to match new break direction

keep: os_state machine: +1/-1 bias, ChoCH = opposite direction break, BOS = same direction break
discard: MaxFractalHistoryBars pruning (our trendline-first handles this differently)
improve: os_state machine is cleaner than our current ChoCH detection — consider refactoring detect_structure_break() to use explicit os_state
CrossedOver/CrossedUnder vs our closed-bar comparison: equivalent — no change needed
LengthInput=5 maps to our LOOKBACK_MAP M15=3; increase to 5 for more significant fractal confirmation

comparison_with_our_system.their_detect_structure_break: Fractal → os_state → CrossedOver/Under → BOS or ChoCH
comparison_with_our_system.alignment: Same logic, different implementation. Their os_state is more explicit than our market_structure comparison.
comparison_with_our_system.improvement: Replace our direction comparison with explicit os_state: if cross_direction == os_state: BOS else: ChoCH. More readable.
